name: Set up Shipping Carrier Labels
body: [{"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you are using an integrated carrier we will assist you to configure your integrated labels and manifests as part of the setup process. Complete the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://forms.neto.com.au/services/shippingcarrierlabelsetup.html", "children": [{"text": "Shipping Carrier Label Form"}]}, {"text": " for each of the carriers you wish to use, and our customer support team will contact you when complete."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up your shipping carrier labels:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on "}, {"text": "Carriers & Labels", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the top right hand side, click the green "}, {"text": "Add New", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and select the carrier you wish to create a label for. For this purpose we will be creating a generic label, so select "}, {"text": "Universal", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add your "}, {"text": "Carrier Details", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Fill out the "}, {"text": "Return Address", "bold": true}, {"text": " which will appear on the labels."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Shipping Services", "bold": true}, {"text": " you wish to use the label with."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Want a personalised label?"}], "data-id": "want-a-personalised-label"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Most integrated couriers do not allow modifications to their labels. However if you wish to make design changes to a generic label, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://forms.neto.com.au/services/designtweak.html", "children": [{"text": "contact a design partner"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
